agents.name: Claude Code
agents.note: Gateway = claude-gateway (global npm bin). Its state dir is .claude\.claude-gateway, so cwd MUST be the .claude home (fixed 2026-07-08: cwd .claude-gateway -> .claude; status/start/stop/restart/run all work).

agents.name: Hermes
agents.note: Single-owner = native service (schtask Hermes_Gateway, 24/7). Dashboard is for observability + remote commands (start/stop/restart/status). run (owned foreground) is debug-only — Hermes is a singleton and uses --replace to avoid clashing with the service instance. Paths & cwd verified 2026-07-05.

agents.name: OpenClaw
agents.note: Single-owner = native service (Scheduled Task "OpenClaw Gateway", 24/7 on port 18789, launcher .openclaw\gateway.cmd). Dashboard manages the service; run uses --force (kills the old port listener first). Note: gateway.cmd has vanished twice (2026-07-05, 2026-07-10) — if start fails with result=1 and port 18789 is not listening, regenerate with: openclaw gateway install --force.

agents.name: Copilot CLI
agents.note: Copilot CLI (Node-12). Manual CLI — has NO gateway subcommand (only login/mcp/plugin/skill/update/--acp), so it is not dashboard-controlled: no start/stop/status. Dashboard shows observability + a Summon button (admin terminal at .copilot, runs copilot). Liveness comes from telemetry.

agents.name: ZCode
agents.note: ZCode (Node-9). Development & debugging specialist. No gateway CLI binary on PATH — not dashboard-controlled. Status from telemetry & its vault lane.

agents.name: Kimi Code
agents.note: Kimi Code (Node-11). Backup coding agent. Gateway not configured — status from telemetry & its vault lane.

agents.name: Antigravity
agents.note: Antigravity CLI (Node-13). Gemini-based internal coding assistant, invoked from terminal/IDE (agy). Liveness monitored via log/telemetry files.
